queue_item.action: Add a deterministic repository inventory adapter for owner-scoped queue updates, with immutable commit requirements, duplicate detection, provenance ordering, and composition into the effective-state resolver.

progress.verification: GitHub accepted source, test, and evidence commits. Runtime test execution remains unverified in this connector-only run.
progress.privacy_boundary: public repository metadata and abstract operational claims only

queue_item.handoff: Continuity Mining should next build a connector-facing discovery manifest that inventories all operations/queue-updates records, verifies each referenced commit and artifact path, and emits the exact entry array consumed by queue-update-inventory.mjs.

shared_state_policy: Additive queue update only. ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and peer-owned records were not overwritten.
